BucketACLDelivered.description: Enable object default bucket ACL inheritance. true: Enable object default bucket ACL inheritance. false: Disable object default bucket ACL inheritance.

Grants.description: Root node for object access control permissions

ACL.description: Bucket access permissions. Includes private, public-read, public-read-write, authenticated-read, bucket-owner-read, bucket-owner-full-control, log-delivery-write, bucket-owner-entrusted, default.

GrantFullControl.description: Grant all permissions to the specified user

GrantRead.description: Grant read permission to the specified user

GrantReadAcp.description: Grant permission to specified user to view bucket ACL

GrantWrite.description: Grant write permission to specified user

GrantWriteAcp.description: Grant permission to the specified user to modify and delete bucket ACL

DaysAfterInitiation.description: Specify lifecycle rule for unmerged multipart tasks (fragments), number of days to delete after task initialization

Date.description: Specific date for deleting the latest version object in the lifecycle rule based on last modified time

Days.description: Number of days for deleting the latest version object based on last modified time in lifecycle rules

Permission.description: Permission type. Includes READ, READ_NON_LIST, WRITE, READ_ACP, WRITE_ACP, FULL_CONTROL

AbortInCompleteMultipartUpload.description: Specify expiration attributes for unmerged multipart tasks (fragments)

Expiration.description: Expiration attribute for deleting the latest version object in the lifecycle rule based on last modified time

Filter.description: Filter conditions for applying the rule

NonCurrentVersionTransitions.description: Expiration attribute for transitioning historical version objects in the lifecycle rule based on last modified time

Prefix.description: Prefix to which the rule applies

Transitions.description: Expiration attribute for transitioning the latest version object in the lifecycle rule based on last modified time

GreaterThanIncludeEqual.description: Equality condition status. Includes Enabled, Disabled

LessThanIncludeEqual.description: Equality condition status. Includes Enabled, Disabled

ObjectSizeGreaterThan.description: Apply rule to objects larger than the specified size

ObjectSizeLessThan.description: Apply rule to objects smaller than the specified size

NonCurrentDate.description: Specific date for deleting historical version objects in the lifecycle rule based on last modified time

NonCurrentDays.description: Number of days to delete historical version objects in the lifecycle rule based on last modified time

NonCurrentDate.description: Specific date for historical version object transition in lifecycle rules based on last modified time

NonCurrentDays.description: Number of days to transition historical version objects in the lifecycle rule based on last modified time

StorageClass.description: Storage class. Includes STANDARD, IA, ARCHIVE_FR, INTELLIGENT_TIERING, COLD_ARCHIVE, ARCHIVE, DEEP_COLD_ARCHIVE

Date.description: Specific date for latest version object transition in lifecycle rules based on last modified time

Days.description: Number of days to transition the latest version object in the lifecycle rule based on last modified time

StorageClass.description: Storage class for historical version object transition in lifecycle rules based on last modified time. Includes STANDARD, IA, ARCHIVE_FR, INTELLIGENT_TIERING, COLD_ARCHIVE, ARCHIVE, DEEP_COLD_ARCHIVE

description: A bucket is a container for storing objects. All objects must belong to a bucket. Buckets have various configuration properties, including region and access permissions. You can create different types of buckets to store different data based on your needs.

AzRedundancy.description: Bucket availability zone redundancy type. Includes single-az: single availability zone redundancy, multi-az: multi availability zone redundancy

BucketType.description: Bucket type. Includes hns: hierarchical bucket type, fns: flat bucket type

EnableVersionStatus.description: Bucket versioning status. Enabled: Enable versioning. Suspended: Suspend versioning

ExtranetEndpoint.description: TOS protocol public access domain name for the bucket

IntranetEndpoint.description: Private network access domain name for the bucket's TOS protocol

Policy.description: String in JSON format containing bucket policy information. The total size of all bucket policy JSONs for a single bucket must not exceed 20KB

StorageClass.description: Default storage class for the bucket. Includes STANDARD: Standard storage. IA: Infrequent access storage. INTELLIGENT_TIERING: Intelligent tiering storage. ARCHIVE_FR: Archive flashback storage. ARCHIVE: Archive storage. COLD_ARCHIVE: Cold archive storage. DEEP_COLD_ARCHIVE: Deep cold archive storage
